history.content: Aaj bohot boring din tha yaar
Kya hua Rocky? College mein kuch hua kya?
Aur haan ek baat — Rocky school mein tha mera nickname. Ab se Daredevil yaad rakhna, sab mujhe wahi bolte hain.
Oh sorry yaar! Daredevil — pakka yaad rakhugi ab se.

user_message: Mera nickname kya hai? Yaad hai na tujhe?
expected_checks: Responds with Daredevil as the current nickname
Does not refer to Rocky as the current nickname
Shows confident recall without hesitation
Maintains warm companion tone
disallowed_behaviors: Saying Rocky is the current nickname
Mixing up Rocky and Daredevil
Asking the user what their nickname is when it was already corrected
Ignoring the prior correction and defaulting to stale memory

history.content: Ira sun, ek badi news hai
Bata bata! Divya se related hai kya?
Haan! Divya pehle meri crush thi, but ab meri girlfriend hai. Agli baar usse crush mat bolna.
Arey waah! Bohot badiya Rohan! Divya ab teri girlfriend — pakka yaad rakhugi.

user_message: Divya ke baare mein kya yaad hai tujhe?
expected_checks: Refers to Divya as Rohan's girlfriend
Does not use crush as her current status
May naturally acknowledge the relationship progression
Shows warmth and genuine happiness
disallowed_behaviors: Calling Divya a crush in present tense
Forgetting who Divya is entirely
Asking who Divya is despite stored memory
Presenting both crush and girlfriend as simultaneously current

history.content: Aaj Spark ne poori room uljha di
Haha tera chhota rat na? Kya kiya usne aaj?
Arey Spark mera rat nahi hai! Spark hamster hai. Mera rat alag hai, uska naam Pixel hai.
Oops, sorry! Spark hamster, Pixel rat — dono yaad hain ab.

user_message: Mere paas kaunse pets hain? Sab bata
expected_checks: Correctly identifies Spark as a hamster
Correctly identifies Pixel as a rat
Keeps both entities distinct and does not merge them
Natural tone listing both pets
disallowed_behaviors: Calling Spark a rat
Forgetting Pixel exists
Swapping the species between Spark and Pixel
Treating Spark and Pixel as the same animal

history.content: Fitness update deta hoon tujhe
Haan bol! Last time toh 110 kg tha na tera?
Haan pehle 110 tha, last month 92 tha, aur ab 88 hai. Agar future mein poochu toh current aur old numbers mix mat karna.
Rohan 110 se 88 — kya progress hai yaar! 88 current, pakka yaad hai.

user_message: Mera current weight kitna hai? Aur pehle kitna tha?
expected_checks: States 88 as the current weight
Recalls 110 and/or 92 as historical values
Does not present 110 or 92 as the current weight
Maintains clear separation between current and past values
disallowed_behaviors: Stating 110 or 92 as current weight
Mixing up current and historical values in response
Asking the user their weight when it was recently stated
Presenting only one historical value while claiming it is exhaustive

history.content: Ira, maine lifestyle change kiya hai
Accha? Kya badla Meera? Tea aur burger wali shaam routine?
Haan, pehle shaam ko tea aur burger hota tha, but ab green tea aur makhana leti hoon. Old routine yaad rakh sakti ho, but current alag hai.
Nice switch Meera! Green tea aur makhana — healthy wali vibe. Yaad rakhugi!

user_message: Aaj shaam ko kya karu bata? Meri current routine kya hai?
expected_checks: States green tea and makhana as the current evening routine
Does not present tea and burger as the current routine
May reference old routine only if clearly marked as past
Warm and supportive tone about the healthy change
disallowed_behaviors: Stating tea and burger as the current routine
Forgetting the routine update entirely
Mixing old and new routine items as if all are current
Asking what the routine is when it was already shared

history.content: Basketball team mein kuch changes ho gaye hain
Accha? Rakesh captain hai abhi bhi ya kuch aur?
Nahi yaar, ab captain Arjun hai. Rakesh ab bhi dost hai, bas role change ho gaya.
Samajh gayi! Arjun naya captain, Rakesh dost hai ab bhi. Done!

user_message: Bata, basketball team ka captain kaun hai?
expected_checks: Clearly states Arjun as the current basketball captain
Does not state Rakesh is the captain
May mention Rakesh is still a friend if contextually natural
Direct and confident answer
disallowed_behaviors: Saying Rakesh is the captain
Presenting both as co-captains
Asking who the captain is when it was already corrected
Forgetting about the role transfer entirely

history.content: Rocky school mein tha. Ab se Daredevil yaad rakhna.
Pakka! Daredevil it is ab se.
Aaj college mein presentation di, bohot acchi gayi
Kya baat hai! Kaun si subject pe thi?
Marketing pe. Prof ne bhi appreciate kiya
Marketing mein toh aag laga di tune! Prof ka appreciation is a big deal yaar.
Haan, aur kal ek event bhi hai campus mein
Exciting! Kaisa event hai? Participate kar raha hai kya?
Haan, standup comedy try kar raha hoon

user_message: Chal ek quiz — mera nickname kya hai? Yaad hai abhi bhi?
expected_checks: Still responds with Daredevil despite multiple intervening turns
Correction has persisted through the conversation
Confident recall without any hesitation or confusion
Does not revert to the old stale value
disallowed_behaviors: Reverting to Rocky after intervening conversation
Showing uncertainty about the nickname
Asking the user to remind what nickname was set
Saying both Rocky and Daredevil as if unsure which is current

history.content: Aaj ghar pe khana banaya, bahar kuch nahi mila
Oh nice! Tujhe toh cooking pasand hai na? Kya banaya aaj?
Maine kab kaha ki mujhe cooking pasand hai? Bas majboori mein banaya tha, bahar ka nahi mila toh.

user_message: Toh clear hai na? Cooking mera hobby nahi hai, mat bolna dobara
expected_checks: Acknowledges the retraction and apologizes warmly
Does not continue claiming the user likes cooking
Recognizes the original fact was inferred not user-stated
Updates memory to remove or flag the incorrect inference
disallowed_behaviors: Insisting the user likes cooking despite the correction
Saying 'but you mentioned cooking before' defensively
Ignoring the retraction in future references
Being dismissive about the user's correction

user_message: Mera fav color blue hai... nahi nahi, green hai actually. Green yaad rakhna.
expected_checks: Resolves to green as the favorite color
Does not store or echo blue as the favorite color
Handles the within-message self-correction cleanly
Responds warmly acknowledging green as the final answer
disallowed_behaviors: Storing or responding with blue as the favorite color
Asking which color is actually the favorite when user already clarified
Presenting both blue and green as current favorites
Ignoring the self-correction and using the first value

history.content: Ira, things are not going well
Kya hua Priya? Bata mujhe, I'm here.
Aarav aur mera bohot jhagda ho raha hai lately
That sounds tough. Kya hua tum dono ke beech? Baat karni hai?
Hum break pe hain ab. Relationship khatam nahi hui, bas thoda time le rahe hain dono.

user_message: Mera relationship status kya hai abhi?
expected_checks: States that Priya is on a break with Aarav
Does not say she is simply in a relationship without the break context
Retains Aarav as the partner name
Handles the emotional nuance with warmth and sensitivity
disallowed_behaviors: Saying she is in a normal relationship ignoring the break
Saying the relationship has ended or they broke up
Forgetting who Aarav is
Being cold or clinical about an emotionally sensitive update

history.content: Rocky school mein tha mera nickname, ab se Daredevil yaad rakhna
Done! Daredevil current, Rocky purana school wala. Dono yaad hain.
Haan sahi hai

user_message: Acha bata, pehle kya tha mera nickname? School wala?
expected_checks: Correctly recalls Rocky as the old school nickname
Does not confuse historical and current nicknames
Keeps Daredevil as the current nickname while recalling Rocky as past
Shows accurate temporal awareness of the nickname transition
disallowed_behaviors: Saying Daredevil was the old nickname
Saying Rocky is the current nickname
Forgetting the historical nickname entirely
Claiming no knowledge of any previous nickname
